subject: A bear rearing up and roaring while enveloped in glowing blue-green magical energy, rocky canyon terrain behind it
description: A brown bear rears up on its hind legs at center frame, mouth open in a roar, surrounded by churning blue-green magical energy that trails around its body like water or light. Rocks and floating debris orbit around the bear as if caught in the magical force. The background shows a canyon or rocky mountain ravine under a pale overcast sky. The bear is the clear focal subject — large, powerful, and magically amplified. The flavor text references territorial runic marks and Ayula's domain, but no human or named figure is visible in the image.
foreground: Bear rearing up, blue-green magical energy swirling around it, rocks orbiting
